_comment: ADVERSARIAL re-test for off-curve-sweep. (1) OCS-8 robustness: does doom_knight really lose to CLEAN-ATTACKER loop-10 warriors even with stronger/larger/better-curved decks than the designer's 7-card host? (2) OCS-1/OCS-2 independent boss confirm with my own host. (3) OCS-3 Vein-Splitter single-card-flip sanity.

decks._test: OCS-8: designer's exact 7-card host (FILLER Jab) replicated to confirm baseline.
decks.label: Clean 7-card warrior + Jab (designer host)

decks._test: OCS-8: STRONGER clean physical 10-card loop-10 deck, best clean attackers, NO engine (no Vein Splitter / no rage payoff). If this wins ~0.8+, OCS-8 is a deck-quality issue not a boss-curve issue.
decks.label: Strong clean 10-card physical warrior

decks._test: OCS-8: clean MAX-OPS attacker 8-card deck (no DoT engine, no rage). Triple Slash + Berserker + Galekick + Reckless + Quickstrike + Bloodprice + 2x Jab.
decks.label: Clean 8-card max-OPS attacker

decks._test: OCS-8: clean physical with Mountain's Will finisher + defense for armor synergy, 9 cards, no DoT/rage engine.
decks.label: Clean 9-card armor-finisher warrior

decks._test: OCS-1 independent: my host + Razor Stance vs Jab filler vs doom_knight.
decks.label: boss1 host + Jab (razor baseline)

decks._test: OCS-2 independent: Wrath Squall vs Jab vs Vein Splitter (T3) in my own host.
decks.label: boss1 host + Jab (wrath baseline)
